title: Erratum: A hereditary angioedema screening on an index case.
authors: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
author_string: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
journal_full: Asian Pacific journal of allergy and immunology
abstract: In the published article "A hereditary angioedema screening on an index case. Asian Pac J Allergy Immunol 2019;37:154-161 DOI 10.12932/AP-060218-0257" the spell of author's name is given incorrectly. Mehmet Yasar Ozkars, Ozlem Keskin, Nazan Bayram, Mehmet Keskin, Hasan Bayram, Yavuz Sahin, Ercan Kucukosmanoglu, Nurhan Attila, Serkan Kirik The author list should be corrected as follows: Mehmet Yasar Ozkars, Ozlem Keskin, Nazan Bayram, Mehmet Keskin, Hasan Bayram, Yavuz Sahin, Ercan Kucukosmanoglu, Nurhan Atilla, Serkan Kirik.
